memory_summarization.scope: cold logs (>24h) + conversation history (cap-driven) + tool results (per-turn) at INTEGRATE; kernel shared

destinations.conversation_history: SQLite conversation_summary table -> [PRIOR CONTEXT] block in system prompt; covered raw turns filtered from message list
destinations.tool_results: SQLite conversation_history (user role) inline, prefixed 'Tool result (<tool>, compressed N->M chars):'

memory_summarization.trigger_conversation: INTEGRATE fires maybe_compress() when uncompressed turns >= 2 * conversation_history cap (scales with hardware throttle)
memory_summarization.trigger_tool_results: INTEGRATE fires maybe_compress_tool_result() when len(str(tool_result)) > threshold_chars (default 4000); below-threshold and failure paths pass through raw

task_ledger.prompt: [ACTIVE TASKS] block in system prompt with arrow cursor on first pending row, [x] on completed
task_ledger.nudge: _run_cycle fires action=task_nudge when pending ledger non-empty + no chain + not re-entering; UNGATED from continuous_mode, bounded by autonomous_loop_limit + single-fire _task_nudge marker
